summary: Completed frontend-only testing of eBay Import feature in GradeProphet app. All requested features verified and working correctly. The eBay importer successfully imports images from eBay URLs, displays them in a grid, allows assignment to Front/Back/Corner slots via a click menu, and supports clearing imported images.

minor.issue: Scrape.do API intermittently returns 502 Bad Gateway (~30% of requests)
minor.note: Third-party service issue - retrying usually succeeds within 1-2 attempts

passed_tests: URL input field accepts eBay URLs (data-testid='ebay-url-input')
Loading spinner displays during import (45-60 second delay is expected)
eBay images display correctly in grid format after import
Suggestion labels (Frente?/Dorso?) appear on imported thumbnails
Assignment menu appears when clicking on eBay thumbnail
Assignment menu contains: Frente (blue), Dorso (purple), 4 corner buttons (amber), Cerrar
Clicking 'Frente' assigns image to Front slot correctly
Clicking 'Dorso' assigns image to Back slot correctly
Assigned images display in their respective slots with FRENTE/DORSO labels
X button appears on hover over assigned image slot
'Limpiar' button clears all imported eBay images from the grid
eBay listing title displays above imported images
critical_code_review_comments: All requested eBay import features are working correctly
The 45-60 second delay is expected behavior due to Scrape.do API with render=true parameter
Assignment menu has good UX with clear button labels and icons
context_for_next_testing_agent: eBay import feature fully tested and working. Test URL that works: https://www.ebay.com/itm/276580167746. Note: Scrape.do API has intermittent 502 errors - if import fails, retry 1-2 times. Import typically takes 45-60 seconds due to render=true parameter.

ebay_import_shows_images.notes: Images display correctly after pasting URL and clicking Import. 3 images loaded from test URL.

assignment_menu_on_click.notes: Menu appears with Frente/Dorso/Corner options and Cerrar (close) button

frente_assignment.notes: Clicking 'Frente' correctly assigns eBay image to Front slot

dorso_assignment.notes: Clicking 'Dorso' correctly assigns eBay image to Back slot

x_button_clear.notes: X button visible on hover, clears individual assigned image when clicked

limpiar_button.notes: 'Limpiar' button successfully clears all imported eBay images from grid
